image:image.image:title: Beverly Hills Luxury Kitchen Remodel — Custom Walnut Cabinetry & Calacatta Marble
image:image.image:caption: Complete luxury kitchen remodel in Beverly Hills featuring floor-to-ceiling custom walnut cabinetry, Calacatta marble countertops, and open-concept design by ET Builders. California Contractor License #899053.

image:image.image:title: Bel-Air Custom Infinity Edge Pool Construction — Resort-Style Outdoor Living
image:image.image:caption: Custom pool construction in Bel-Air featuring an infinity edge, integrated spa, panoramic canyon views, and custom limestone decking. Designed and built by ET Builders, Los Angeles.

image:image.image:title: Bel-Air Infinity Pool — Spa & Outdoor Entertainment Area Detail
image:image.image:caption: Detail view of the integrated spa and outdoor entertaining area in this Bel-Air custom pool project by ET Builders.

image:image.image:title: Santa Monica Full Home Renovation — 6,500 sq ft Los Angeles Home Transformation
image:image.image:caption: Complete full home transformation in Santa Monica converting a 1970s residence into a modern coastal masterpiece. New structural walls, custom millwork, primary suite addition, and chef's kitchen by ET Builders.

image:image.image:title: Santa Monica Home Remodel — Custom Kitchen & Millwork Interior Detail
image:image.image:caption: Interior detail of the custom chef's kitchen and millwork in this Santa Monica full home renovation by ET Builders, Los Angeles.

image:image.image:title: Malibu Outdoor Kitchen & Pergola Design — Oceanfront Living Space
image:image.image:caption: Oceanfront outdoor living space in Malibu with custom pergola, fully equipped outdoor kitchen, fire pit lounge, and terraced pool integration. Designed and built by ET Builders, Los Angeles.

image:image.image:title: Westwood Luxury Kitchen Remodel — Nero Marquina Marble Waterfall Island
image:image.image:caption: Luxury kitchen remodel in Westwood featuring a dramatic bookmatched Nero Marquina marble waterfall island, integrated appliances, and floor-to-ceiling custom cabinetry by ET Builders.

image:image.image:title: Westwood Kitchen Remodel — Custom Cabinetry & Integrated Appliance Detail
image:image.image:caption: Detail view of custom floor-to-ceiling cabinetry and integrated appliances in this Westwood luxury kitchen renovation by ET Builders, Beverly Hills contractor.
